title: K8s cluster lateral movement in k8s

kill_chain.technique: T1613 Container/Cluster Discovery / T1021 Remote Services (in-cluster)
kill_chain.description: A compromised pod (10.244.1.13) discovered cluster services via CoreDNS, reached the API server (10.96.0.1), then fanned out mTLS to 4 pods across the service mesh.

iocs.expected_signal: a pod talking to 10.96.0.1:443 then mTLS fan-out to many pods (VXLAN-decapped)
